title: Case Processing Centre: Sydney, Nova Scotia - Canada.ca
content:
## Case Processing Centre: Sydney, Nova Scotia
Mailing addresses for:
- Citizenship applications
- Permanent resident card
- Grants CPC-Sydney P.O. Box 7000 Sydney, NS  B1P 6V6
- Proof of citizenship CPC-Sydney P.O. Box 10000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
- Searches CPC-Sydney P.O. Box 10010 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
- Canadian Armed Forces CAF – Grants and Resumptions IRCC Case Processing Centre CAF -Citizenship P.O. Box 8200 Sydney, NS  B1P 0G7
- Courier address IRCC Digitization Centre - Citizenship 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS  B1H 5V8
- For documents requested by CPC Sydney CPC-Sydney P.O Box 12,000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C2

### Permanent Resident Cards
- Mail address P.O. Box 10020 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
- For correspondence P.O. Box 9000 Sydney, NS  B1P 6K7
- Courier address 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS B1H 5V8
